data.body: [operator-attested] AC6 verified live: Gerrit change #671 (this ticket's own project.config source change) landed via a plain Gerrit Submit with both votes green (LLM-Review+1, Verified+1) under the new submit_type=REBASE_IF_NECESSARY — MERGED to main as 5d1f712fd, no Autosubmit label, no auto-lander. Its parent was the current tip at submit, so Gerrit fast-forwarded (the 'if necessary' rebase was not needed for this change); the server-side rebase-when-behind path is Gerrit's built-in Rebase-If-Necessary behavior, now enabled by the verified submit_type and applied automatically to any behind-tip change (replacing the retired manual-FFO-rebase treadmill). The textual-conflict 'rebase manually' refusal is Gerrit's standard behavior under this submit type. Net: the Submit-when-green model is live and demonstrated.
